text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF 27 CCW Chronic Conditions (CC) File Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.3 24 

CANCER_COLORECTAL 

LABEL: Colorectal Cancer End-of-Year Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether a beneficiary met the Chronic Condition Warehouse (CCW) criteria for 
colorectal cancer as of the end of the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: CNCRCLRC 

LONG NAME: CANCER_COLORECTAL 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: 0 = Beneficiary
